title: Israel says Lebanon must choose between West and Iran ahead of Pentagon talks — Israel demands Hezbollah disarmament as precondition
snippet: Ahead of Pentagon security track meeting, Israel's position demands Lebanon choose alignment: either with the West (accepting Hezbollah disarmament) or with Iran. Israel seeks Lebanese action to disarm Hezbollah and halt cross-border attacks, while Beirut wants clarity on timeline for Israeli withdrawal from the south.
tag_reason: Israel's explicit 'choose between West and Iran' framing is new — sets context for Pentagon talks
